# WishlyAI

WishlyAI is an AI-powered social media content generation platform for restaurants in India.

## What it does

Creates ready-to-post Instagram and WhatsApp content for restaurant owners — festival posts, review milestone celebrations, daily offers, sports-night promos, and business updates — in under 30 seconds, directly from the restaurant's Google Business Profile data.

## Key capabilities

- Generates branded social media images and captions automatically
- Detects upcoming festivals, sports events, and review milestones
- Connects to Google Business Profile for restaurant-specific personalisation
- Produces content for Instagram, WhatsApp, and Facebook
- Managed social media service available for restaurants that want fully done-for-you posting

## Target users

Restaurant founders, food business owners, cloud kitchen operators, and restaurant chains in India.

## Markets

Primary: India (restaurants and food businesses)
Secondary: International (English-language restaurant markets)

## Core phrase

AI content generation for restaurant owners

## URLs

WishlyAI is built by AI Plus Labs.
